mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_book) AS book_total, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock), 0) FROM lib_stock) AS stock_total, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(current_stock), 0) FROM lib_stock) AS available_stock_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_borrow WHERE create_time <= #{endTime} AND (reality_return_time IS NULL OR reality_return_time > #{endTime}) AND return_time >= #{endTime}) AS borrowing_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_borrow WHERE reality_return_time IS NOT NULL AND reality_return_time <= #{endTime}) AS returned_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_borrow WHERE create_time <= #{endTime} AND (reality_return_time IS NULL OR reality_return_time > #{endTime}) AND return_time < #{endTime}) AS overdue_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0) AS enabled_user_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_auth_log WHERE event_type = 'LOGIN' AND success = 1 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime}) AS login_success_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_auth_log WHERE event_type = 'LOGIN' AND success = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime}) AS login_failure_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_oper_log WHERE success = 1 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime}) AS oper_success_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_oper_log WHERE success = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time < #{endTime}) AS oper_failure_count

SELECT bw.isbn, bw.book_name AS bookName, b.cover, COUNT(*) AS count FROM lib_borrow AS bw LEFT JOIN lib_book AS b ON b.isbn = bw.isbn WHERE bw.create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY bw.isbn, bw.book_name, b.cover ORDER BY count DESC, bw.isbn ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT module AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_oper_log WHERE create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY module ORDER BY count DESC, module ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN username IS NULL OR username = '' THEN '未知用户' ELSE username END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_auth_log WHERE success = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY name ORDER BY count DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN client_ip IS NULL OR client_ip = '' THEN 'unknown' ELSE client_ip END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM sys_auth_log WHERE success = 0 AND create_time >= #{startTime} GROUP BY name ORDER BY count DESC, name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT bw.id AS borrowId, bw.isbn, b.cover, bw.book_name AS bookName, u.username, bw.return_time AS returnTime, CASE WHEN bw.reality_return_time IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN bw.return_time >= NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS status, bw.create_time AS createTime FROM lib_borrow AS bw LEFT JOIN lib_book AS b ON b.isbn = bw.isbn LEFT JOIN sys_user AS u ON u.id = bw.user_id ORDER BY bw.create_time DESC, bw.id DESC
SELECT id AS logId, module, action, operator_username AS operatorUsername, success, result_code AS resultCode, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_oper_log ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id AS logId, event_type AS eventType, username, client_ip AS clientIp, result_code AS resultCode, failure_summary AS failureSummary, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_auth_log WHERE success = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
